---
title: "Feature Discussion"
labels: ["enhancement", "discussion"]
about: "Discuss a potential feature or API direction before opening an issue."
---

## Problem

Describe the problem this feature idea solves.

## Proposed direction

What behavior would help users? Include API sketch if possible.

## Tradeoffs

What are the risks, complexity, and potential impact?

## References

Links, use-cases, or examples.
